edge_hypothesis: Bollinger band breakouts with volume confirmation capture volatility expansion after compression (squeeze) periods. When Bollinger bandwidth contracts then price breaks above/below the bands with above-average volume, the move tends to persist as trapped traders are forced out. This targets regime transitions from ranging to trending. Regime assumption: RANGING-TO-TRENDING transition. Invalidation: if trades < 30 in 90 days or PF < 0.90, the squeeze-breakout pattern is too rare or unreliable on ETH.

variants.name: bollinger_volume_confirmed_breakout
variants.description: Bollinger breakout requiring 1.5x average volume for confirmation. High-conviction entries only. Wide 3:1 R:R to combat fee drag. Tests whether volume-confirmed breakouts have persistent follow-through on ETH.
entry_long: Close breaks above BBU_20_2.0 (upper Bollinger band).
Volume >= 1.5x 20-period volume SMA confirms institutional participation.
entry_short: Close breaks below BBL_20_2.0 (lower Bollinger band).
Volume >= 1.5x 20-period volume SMA confirms institutional participation.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit long when close crosses back below BBM_20_2.0 (middle band).
Exit short when close crosses back above BBM_20_2.0 (middle band).
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (3.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: False breakout reverses into band, stop hit before momentum develops
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 3.0x ATR_14 from entry.

variants.name: bollinger_pure_breakout_tight
variants.description: Pure Bollinger breakout without volume filter (volume_ratio_min=1.0 means any volume). More trades but lower conviction. Tighter 2:1 R:R for faster profit-taking. Tests whether the volume filter actually adds value vs pure price breakout.
entry_long: Close breaks above BBU_20_2.0 (upper Bollinger band).
entry_short: Close breaks below BBL_20_2.0 (lower Bollinger band).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit long when close crosses back below BBM_20_2.0 (middle band).
Exit short when close crosses back above BBM_20_2.0 (middle band).
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (2.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Without volume confirmation, false breakouts may dominate
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 2.0x ATR_14 from entry.

variants.name: bollinger_wide_exit_low_frequency
variants.description: High volume threshold (2.0x) plus wide 4:1 R:R. Designed for very low trade frequency with high conviction. Tests the extreme end of the fee-drag reduction strategy: only trade the best breakouts with maximum profit targets.
entry_long: Close breaks above BBU_20_2.0 (upper Bollinger band).
Volume >= 2.0x 20-period volume SMA confirms strong participation.
entry_short: Close breaks below BBL_20_2.0 (lower Bollinger band).
Volume >= 2.0x 20-period volume SMA confirms strong participation.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit long when close crosses back below BBM_20_2.0 (middle band).
Exit short when close crosses back above BBM_20_2.0 (middle band).
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (4.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Too few trades for statistical significance
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 4.0x ATR_14 from entry.
